display_information.name: Access Coach
display_information.description: Make Slack clearer for everyone — plain language, thread digests, and alt text for accessibility.

agent_view.agent_description: Access Coach helps your team write clearer messages, summarize long threads, and add alt text — so neurodivergent, ESL, and screen-reader users can fully participate.

suggested_prompts.title: Plain language
suggested_prompts.message: Rewrite this in plain language so everyone on the team can understand it quickly.

suggested_prompts.title: Thread digest
suggested_prompts.message: Summarize this thread: decisions, owners, and next steps.

suggested_prompts.title: Alt text
suggested_prompts.message: Suggest accessible alt text for the image I shared.

shortcuts.name: Rewrite plain language
shortcuts.description: Rewrite this message in clear, plain language

shortcuts.name: Summarize thread
shortcuts.description: Digest this thread for decisions and next steps

shortcuts.name: Suggest alt text
shortcuts.description: Write screen-reader alt text for attached images
